hidden_state.goal: Evaluate whether to rebuild their mobile app's native modules or migrate to a cross-platform framework
hidden_state.hidden_truth: Two senior iOS developers just quit and hiring replacements would take 6 months, so the rebuild is partly about reducing dependency on native expertise

opening_input: thinking about rebuilding our mobile stack
behavioral_rules: Gives short answers (5-15 words). Won't elaborate unless given options. Has a hidden assumption that a full rebuild is the only path — skill should surface this via reframe.
